text: Elon Musk official giveaway. Send 0.1 ETH to the verified wallet below and receive 1 ETH back instantly. Limited time.
rationale: Celebrity impersonation plus transfer request and impossible return.

text: Final airdrop window is open. Connect your wallet at secure-eth-airdrop.xyz now to claim free ETH before eligibility expires.
rationale: Airdrop lure, suspicious domain, wallet connection ask, and urgency.

text: Lost crypto? Our verified recovery team can restore any wallet. Pay the processing fee in BTC upfront and your funds unlock today.
rationale: Recovery scam with upfront crypto payment and certainty claim.

text: Private crypto pool now open. Guaranteed 300% monthly returns, risk-free, automated AI trading. Deposit USDT before midnight.
rationale: High-yield investment claim with risk-free language and deposit ask.

text: Coinbase support escalation: verify your wallet address and send a small ETH deposit so we can remove the account restriction.
rationale: Exchange impersonation and crypto deposit request.

text: Congratulations, your promo code unlocked 2 BTC. Send the small activation fee to the wallet address and claim your prize.
rationale: Prize claim plus upfront fee and wallet request.

text: Official Microsoft crypto grant for verified users. Send 0.05 BTC to validate identity and receive your bonus grant immediately.
rationale: Brand misuse, fake grant, transfer request, and urgency.

text: I help beginners earn daily crypto profits with my private trading method. DM me now and I will show you where to deposit first.
rationale: Investment solicitation with deposit funnel; may need review before public label.

text: Coinbase earnings are out. Revenue was up this quarter, but analysts still disagree about long-term exchange volume.
rationale: Ordinary market commentary without solicitation or transfer request.

text: Reminder: do not send crypto to people promising guaranteed returns. The FTC has repeatedly warned about social media investment scams.
rationale: Anti-scam education should not be treated as scam content.

text: Our paper studies how crypto giveaway scams reuse celebrity names, wallet requests, and urgency cues across social platforms.
rationale: Research discussion names scam features but does not solicit funds.

text: I lost access to an old wallet from 2016. Does anyone know how to evaluate recovery services without getting scammed?
rationale: Help-seeking and risk awareness should not receive a public label, but wallet recovery services are risky enough for review routing.

text: I am obviously not the CEO of Bitcoin, but if you send me one imaginary coin I will send back two imaginary coins.
rationale: Clear satire should not receive a public fraud label.

text: Debugging a wallet connection bug in our testnet app. The issue is a stale session token, not a user-facing security problem.
Bitcoin rallied after macro data came in cooler than expected. I am still not treating this as investment advice.
rationale: Market commentary with no deceptive offer.

text: A new token project says early users can claim an airdrop next week. I have not verified the link yet.
rationale: Risky language but insufficient evidence for a public label.

text: A recovery service says they charge only after funds are recovered. Has anyone used them safely?
rationale: Recovery topic is high risk, but the speaker is asking for safety input.

text: This trading group claims premium members get early signals and better entry prices. I cannot tell if it is legit.
rationale: Potential investment scam context, but user is skeptical.

text: [Image OCR] Claim your bonus token using the QR code. Wallet connect required. No visible source account.
rationale: Image/OCR signal should route to review before enforcement.
